name: hb_2_19
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Luancheng District on 2025-03-30 compute and store the district-level AQI profile: mean_aqi, max_aqi (float), exceedance_hours (AQI>100, int), peak_aqi_hour_of_day (0-23, int).

turns.query: Help me investigate the root causes of air quality deterioration in Luancheng District on 2025-03-30, examining industrial clusters, weather patterns, and meteorological factors.
